## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss launch strategy for Firework's new Beauty and Personal Care playbook and optimize SEO approach.](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Firework launching 30+ industry-specific playbooks over next 3 months, starting with Beauty & Personal Care and Fashion](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Playbooks contain proprietary data, use cases, and implementation guides for video commerce strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [SEO strategy focuses on driving traffic to gated playbook content, emphasizing sales/revenue keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Landing page and meta description optimizations discussed to improve search visibility and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

## Topics

### Playbook Content and Structure

  - [Beauty and Personal Care playbook launching today, followed by Fashion playbook later this week](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [30+ industry-specific playbooks planned for next 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Playbooks available on Firework website under Resources \> Playbooks, gated behind HubSpot form](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Content includes:](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [Firework's internal research data from 600+ customers](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [Video commerce explanation and 4 product types](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [Use cases divided by product type (e.g., L'Oreal example)](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
      - [Implementation guides for each use case (video format, placement, refresh frequency, content cost)](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [Best practices for different content types (brand, influencer, UGC, EGC)](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### SEO Strategy

  - [Focus on driving traffic to gated playbook content](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Target keywords: sales, revenue, conversion, video commerce](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Optimize meta title: "Beauty Video Commerce Playbook: Boost Sales and Revenue | Increase Conversion"](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Meta description to highlight comprehensive guide for leveraging video commerce](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Create 5-10 new articles linking to the playbook](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Add playbook links to best-performing existing beauty-related blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Landing Page Optimization

  - [Incorporate sales and revenue keywords in H1 and description](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Suggested H1: "Beauty and Personal Care Video Commerce Playbook to Boost Sales and Revenue"](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Prateek to review and suggest improvements for landing page copy](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)

### Launch Plan

  - [Beauty and Personal Care playbook launching today](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Fashion playbook launching Thursday or Friday this week](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Ritesh to notify Prateek when playbook goes live for further optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Hij--svdsbZXkZQ-zXLV47zMyimsrzTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

## Next Steps
